Zheng Xiang й„ӯеғҸ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Xiang (й„ӯеғҸ). Sacrificed his life to give a morale boost to Xincheng. Zheng Xiang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
